{{Infobox character
| name = Longhook
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Underlord, gentleman, Redmoon Underlord
| abilities = Blood Shadow, Path of Rolling Earth, Mountain's Fist Enforcer
| affiliations = Redmoon Hall
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

''See also: [[Longhook Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Longhook is an [[Underlord]] and emissary representing [[Redmoon Hall]]. He possesses a specialized weapon consisting of a heavy chain ending in a thick meat hook, which is actually his [[Blood Shadow]] wrapped around a sacred weapon. He can manipulate this tool with extreme speed and grace, using it to strike with enough force to penetrate ships or shatter stone. In combat, he has demonstrated the ability to use his [[Blood Shadow]] as a weapon in its own right and can manifest it to mimic his movements. Physically, he is at least as large and broad as [[Lindon]]. During various confrontations, Longhook has sustained injuries including a sliced neck, a twisted knee, and significant damage to one arm and eye. Despite these setbacks, he has shown resilience in battle, though his death was eventually confirmed by sect oracles.}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Longhook]] is a [[Redmoon Hall emissary]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Longhook]] has a cut along the side of his neck.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Longhook]] was an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Longhook]] is a gentleman from [[Redmoon Hall]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c18">''Skysworn'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Longhook is a [[pure madra]] [[Underlord]] who follows the [[Path of Rolling Earth]]. He wields a heavy hook-and-chain weapon, which is a sacred tool wrapped in a [[Blood Shadow]]. Having had his body reborn in [[soulfire]], he fights using the [[Mountain's Fist Enforcer]] technique despite having a nearly blinded right eye. Although currently facing a specific situation, his ultimate [[fate]] remains undecided.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]]'s weapon is a [[Blood Shadow]] wrapped around a sacred weapon consisting of a long, heavy chain with a thick meat hook at the end.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]] is an [[Underlord]] who possesses a [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]]'s right eye is nearly blinded.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]]'s body was reborn in [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]] uses the [[Path of Rolling Earth]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]] uses the [[Mountain's Fist Enforcer]] technique.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]] is a [[pure madra]] [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]]'s weapon is a hook-and-chain.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Longhook]]'s [[fate]] does not end with his current situation.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Longhook]] is the [[Redmoon Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Longhook]] is a deceased individual.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Redmoon Hall]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
